methodology: Data collected from major financial sites including NerdWallet, Bankrate, TPG, and CNBC Select. All fees and rewards current for 2026.

cards.cardName: Chase Sapphire Preferred® Card
cards.rewardsRate: 5x on travel via Chase, 3x on dining/streaming/online groceries
cards.signupBonus: Earn 75,000 bonus points after $5,000 spend in 3 months

cards.cardName: Wells Fargo Autograph® Card
cards.rewardsRate: 3x on restaurants, travel, gas, transit, streaming, phone plans
cards.signupBonus: Earn 20,000 bonus points after $1,000 spend in 3 months
